title: Ada and the Magic Library Books
synopsis: Ada discovers that the fairy tale books in her school library have come to life, and she must help the mixed-up characters find their way back to the right stories before the librarian returns.

pages.text: Ada loved reading time at school. She sat in the cozy library corner with her favorite book. It was about a brave princess who saved dragons. 'I wish fairy tales were real,' Ada whispered. Suddenly, the book began to glow! Golden sparkles danced around the pages. Ada's eyes grew wide with wonder.

illustration.description: A young Black girl with curly hair and big brown eyes sits cross-legged in a bright library corner, holding a glowing golden book. Magical sparkles swirl around her as sunlight streams through colorful windows. Her expression shows amazement and joy.
illustration.alt: Ada sits in the library holding a glowing magical book with sparkles around her

pages.text: POOF! Three small figures jumped out of the book. There was Goldilocks with messy blonde hair. A tiny dragon with purple scales sneezed fire. And a wolf in a red cape looked very confused. 'Where are we?' asked Goldilocks. 'This isn't the forest!' The dragon hiccupped more sparkles everywhere.

illustration.description: Three fairy tale characters stand on an open book - Goldilocks with wild blonde curls, a small adorable purple dragon breathing sparkly fire, and a friendly wolf wearing a red riding hood cape. They look confused but cute in the bright library setting.
illustration.alt: Three magical characters emerge from the glowing book looking confused

pages.text: Ada giggled. 'You're in my school library!' she said. 'But something is wrong. Goldilocks, why is the wolf wearing your red cape?' The wolf looked down at himself. 'I don't know! And why does this little dragon have my grandmother's glasses?' Everyone looked at the dragon, who was indeed wearing tiny spectacles.

illustration.description: Ada points and laughs while the three mixed-up characters examine themselves. The dragon now wears small round glasses that are too big for his tiny face. The scene is warm and colorful with bookshelves in the background. Everyone has confused but friendly expressions.
illustration.alt: Ada and the mixed-up fairy tale characters realize something is wrong

pages.text: More books started glowing around the library. POP! POP! POP! Out came more confused characters. Cinderella had a long braid instead of a bun. Rapunzel wore glass slippers that were too big for her feet. She kept tripping over them. 'Oops!' she said, tumbling into a pile of pillows.

illustration.description: A diverse group of fairy tale characters in the library - Cinderella (Asian girl) with a long braid looking puzzled, Rapunzel (Latina girl) trying to walk in oversized glass slippers and falling into colorful floor pillows. More glowing books float in the background with magical sparkles.
illustration.alt: More mixed-up fairy tale characters appear in the library

pages.text: 'Oh no!' Ada said. 'All the fairy tale characters are mixed up!' The Three Bears came out next, but they were all different sizes than before. Papa Bear was tiny. Mama Bear was huge. And Baby Bear was just right... for a giant! 'This porridge bowl is too small!' squeaked tiny Papa Bear.

illustration.description: Three bears of wrong sizes stand near tiny bowls - Papa Bear is adorably small and brown, Mama Bear is enormous and fluffy, while Baby Bear towers over them both but looks sweet and gentle. Ada watches with wide eyes as the bears try to figure out their size problem.
illustration.alt: The Three Bears are all the wrong sizes in the magical library

pages.text: Ada counted all the mixed-up characters. There were twelve in total! They all talked at once. 'We need to get back to our stories!' said Cinderella. 'But everything is wrong!' cried Rapunzel. The little purple dragon flew in circles, sneezing more magic sparkles. 'I can help you!' Ada announced bravely.

illustration.description: Ada stands confidently in the center of the library surrounded by all twelve colorful, diverse fairy tale characters. They gesture and talk animatedly while magical sparkles float everywhere. The scene is bustling but cheerful, with warm lighting from the library windows.
illustration.alt: Ada surrounded by twelve mixed-up fairy tale characters in the library

pages.text: Ada had an idea. 'Let's play a game!' she said. 'Everyone find the things that belong to someone else.' The characters looked around at each other. The wolf gave the red cape to Little Red Riding Hood. She was so happy! 'Thank you!' she said, twirling around in her proper cape.

illustration.description: Ada claps her hands excitedly as the wolf hands a red cape to Little Red Riding Hood, a cheerful girl with dark skin and braided hair. Both characters smile warmly at each other while other fairy tale characters watch in the background. The library setting remains magical with soft golden light.
illustration.alt: The wolf returns the red cape to Little Red Riding Hood

pages.text: Next, the dragon gave the tiny glasses to Grandmother Wolf. 'These are mine!' she said happily. Rapunzel gave her glass slippers to Cinderella. They fit perfectly! Cinderella gave her long braid to Rapunzel. 'Now I can let it down from towers again!' Rapunzel laughed.

illustration.description: Multiple character exchanges happening - an elderly wolf character with gray fur wearing the small glasses, Cinderella trying on the glass slippers with joy, and Rapunzel admiring her returned long braid. Everyone looks happy and relieved as they get their proper items back.
illustration.alt: The fairy tale characters exchange their mixed-up items

pages.text: Soon, all the characters had their right things back. The Three Bears were their proper sizes again too. 'How did you fix everything?' asked Goldilocks. Ada smiled. 'I read all your stories many times. I know exactly how you should be!' The purple dragon burped one last sparkle.

illustration.description: All the fairy tale characters now look correct and happy, standing together in the library. Ada beams proudly in the center as everyone applauds her. The Three Bears are proper sizes, everyone has their right accessories, and the little purple dragon floats nearby looking content.
illustration.alt: All the fairy tale characters are back to normal, celebrating with Ada

pages.text: The characters started glowing again. 'Time to go back to our books!' said Cinderella. 'Thank you for helping us, Ada!' One by one, they jumped back into their stories. The wolf waved goodbye. Goldilocks blew a kiss. The dragon did a little loop in the air before disappearing.

illustration.description: The fairy tale characters are glowing with golden light as they wave goodbye to Ada. Some are mid-jump back into their books, others are waving or blowing kisses. The scene is warm and magical with sparkles everywhere, showing the characters returning to their proper stories with joy.
illustration.alt: The fairy tale characters say goodbye as they return to their books

pages.text: Soon, all the books were back on the shelves. Everything looked normal again. But Ada noticed something special. Each book had a tiny sparkle on its cover. Just then, Mrs. Chen the librarian came back. 'How was reading time, Ada?' she asked with a knowing smile.

illustration.description: Mrs. Chen, a kind Asian woman with glasses and a warm smile, stands next to Ada in the now-quiet library. The books on the shelves have tiny sparkles on their covers. Ada looks up at the librarian with a secret smile, while golden afternoon light streams through the windows.
illustration.alt: Mrs. Chen the librarian returns to find Ada in the peaceful library

pages.text: 'It was magical!' Ada said. Mrs. Chen winked. 'The best stories always are.' Ada hugged her favorite book close. She whispered, 'Thank you for the adventure.' The book felt warm in her hands, and she could have sworn she heard tiny voices saying, 'Thank you, Ada!' Reading time was the best time of all.

illustration.description: Ada sits contentedly hugging her favorite book while Mrs. Chen arranges nearby shelves. The library glows with warm, golden light and Ada's expression shows pure happiness and wonder. A few tiny sparkles still float around her book, suggesting the magic continues.
illustration.alt: Ada hugs her book happily while Mrs. Chen smiles in the magical library

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What happened when Ada wished fairy tales were real?
questions.explanation: When Ada wished fairy tales were real, her book began to glow with golden sparkles!

questions.question: What was wrong with the fairy tale characters?
questions.explanation: The fairy tale characters were mixed up and had each other's belongings, like the wolf wearing the red cape.

questions.question: How did Ada help fix the problem?
questions.explanation: Ada organized a game where the characters traded items back to their rightful owners.

questions.question: Who is the school librarian?
questions.explanation: Mrs. Chen is the kind librarian who returned to check on Ada after reading time.

questions.question: What did Ada notice about the books at the end?
questions.explanation: Ada noticed that each book had a tiny sparkle on its cover, showing that magic was still there.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.instruction: Fill in the missing words from Ada's adventure!
pages.text: Ada loved reading in the school ___. When she wished fairy tales were real, the book started to ___. Three characters jumped out: Goldilocks, a tiny ___, and a confused wolf. They were all mixed up! Ada helped them trade their ___ back to the right owners.

pages.title: Character Mix-Up
pages.instruction: Help sort out what belongs to whom!
pages.text: The fairy tale characters were confused! The ___ was wearing a red cape that belonged to Little Red Riding Hood. The dragon had tiny ___ that belonged to Grandmother. Cinderella had a long ___ instead of her usual bun. When Ada helped them trade back, everyone was ___!
